meta.title: The Influence of Emetine on the Induction of Interferon by Poly-I:Poly-C in Swiss Mice
authors: Van Griensven, L. J. L. D.

abstractHtml: The effect of emetine on the in vivo production of interferon by Swiss mice stimulated with poly-I:poly-C, was studied. 100 µg of emetine per mouse yielded a 16-fold increase in interferon production. Maximal production of interferon was achieved 2 h after the simultaneous injection of emetine and poly-I:poly-C.
